import { z } from "zod"; const indexRouteSchema = z.object({ type: z.literal("index"), file: z.string() }); const layoutRouteSchema = z.object({ type: z.literal("layout"), id: z.string().optional(), file: z.string(), children: z.array(z.lazy(() => virtualRouteNodeSchema)).optional() }); const routeSchema = z.object({ type: z.literal("route"), file: z.string().optional(), path: z.string(), children: z.array(z.lazy(() => virtualRouteNodeSchema)).optional() }); const physicalSubTreeSchema = z.object({ type: z.literal("physical"), directory: z.string(), pathPrefix: z.string() }); const virtualRouteNodeSchema = z.union([ indexRouteSchema, layoutRouteSchema, routeSchema, physicalSubTreeSchema ]); const virtualRootRouteSchema = z.object({ type: z.literal("root"), file: z.string(), children: z.array(virtualRouteNodeSchema).optional() }); export { virtualRootRouteSchema }; //# sourceMappingURL=config.js.map
